milestones.name: Versioned legal corpus
milestones.summary: Versioned legal corpus. 0/5 accepted. Five-task chain contracted under D-002 (carried from PR #93, superseded): M3-T001 (source-authority hierarchy + coverage matrix + registry channels + legal-source-manifest + DOCUMENT_EVIDENCE_POLICY + construction-code-release-scope draft) is first-wave lane 1; M3-T002 immutable source capture + versioning; M3-T003 Document Evidence Verification Engine; M3-T004 cross-reference closure graph; M3-T005 DOB construction-code + amendment overlay. Dependency order T001->T002->T003->T004; T005 needs T001+T002+T003+B-001+B-011. M3-T002/T003/T005 acceptance blocked by B-001 (durable storage) while open; M3-T005 also by B-011 (construction-code scope). M4 rule work proceeded on needs_review rules per owner directive 2026-07-21; full M3 corpus still owed before publication/G6.

milestones.name: Rule engineering and professional review
milestones.summary: 0/6 tasks accepted. M4-T001..T006 all MERGED to main as DRAFT engineering (needs_review rules; T006 = R5 height/setback, PR #88); gates PASS recorded/on-file. NONE accepted, Published, or Verified. Whole chain blocked from acceptance by G6 qualified-human legal approval on M4-T001 (+ B-010 client benchmark). M4-T007 = exact Decimal/legal-units arithmetic foundation (D-002 first-wave lane 2; DF-2/B-014), deterministic engineering acceptable independent of G6. The PR #91 yard/coverage footprint proposal (which sketched M4-T007..T010) is SUPERSEDED and, being downstream of accepted M3-T004 + canonical zoning-lot model (Area C), will be re-proposed at fresh IDs after those land; it does not reserve M4-T007.
